name: Team Warner
subject: The results are in for the second debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Thank you for watching the second Virginia Senate debate with us tonight. Mark Warner continues to show that he will keep delivering on his promise to make life better for _all_ Virginians.

Mark's opponent by contrast has shown us that, to him, leadership means rolling back the progress we've made in Virginia.
* First, Mark's opponent praised Trump's "leadership" during the coronavirus pandemic.
* Then, he said he'd back Trump's Supreme Court nominee -- before he even found out who that person was.
* Finally, last weekend, Trump endorsed Mark's opponent at his Newport News rally.

We have a lot of work to do in order to provide justice for all Americans in this country. Virginia needs leaders like Mark Warner, who are willing to roll up their sleeves and develop policy that will create real change, not hateful division. With your help, we can keep Mark in the Senate, creating more opportunities for everyone. [**Chip in to make a contribution towards Mark 's re-election campaign.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da6c/53d9897e/55b48156/1c88e60d/1948248828/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-allvirginians?refcode=20201003_f_2_nd__847__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5") Thanks for your support!

-- Team Warner

Friend,

President Trump wants to thank all the medical professionals at Walter Reed Medical Center. It’s the finest medical center in the world - and they’ve been doing an incredible job.

The President is feeling great and is ready to get back with the American People soon so he can Make America Great Again.

He has made it clear that we need to finish our movement the exact same way we started - fighting for the People, not just in the United States, but all around the world. The President is going to beat the coronavirus, and he’s going to beat it soundly.

clean_body: | = | | We’re just under one month out from Election Day, friend, and we’re heading into these last 30 days in a better position than we’ve ever been, down just TWO points in the polls from Republican Michael McCaul. But this is our last chance to reach out to voters and our last chance to battle back against the attacks our opponent and his Washington allies have been playing on repeat throughout the district. This moment will make or break our campaign. = That’s why we need ALL HANDS ON DECK in this last month, friend. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Let’s win this race like we started it: together! Friend,

There is no one like my father.

Day two into this and he’s working hard and looking great. If it was anyone else, I’d be surprised, but, that’s just OUR President.

He even released an official video message from Walter Reed Medical Center because he wants to speak DIRECTLY TO THE AMERICAN PEOPLE, directly to you.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=dd0c1d7f09d9b786e977e561f9de6d75ed01ebf6761189c6c389498a0849072e209824383058a59ba7fa41e2c33b6bb3e5f7b50edc91f083

STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP NOW >>

NO ONE is tougher than President Trump, and I know he will beat this thing fast. My family, the President, in particular, is forever grateful for the outpour of love throughout the Nation and around the world.

President Trump couldn’t sit back while this was going on – he had to go forward and lead our nation. Leaders confront challenges head-on, and that’s exactly what my father is doing.

We are in the final stretch of this Election, and while my father is working hard to get back on the road as quickly as possible, it’s up to us to keep our movement strong for his EPIC RETURN.

| | Defeating Senator Cornyn isn't going to be easy, Peter, and when I see just how much money corporate PACs and special interests are throwing behind his campaign, I get a bit overwhelmed.

But whenever I feel that way, I think of this grassroots army and what we all have to gain by electing MJ. **[Will you donate to help take on Sen. Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cde/7f51f7bc/44815338/4efba1d7/2203698377/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201004.1nd__2232__&amount=10")**

* MJ will protect the Affordable Care Act and support expanding our health care system to cover even more people with a public option.
* She will fight for the US Postal Service to ensure timely mail delivery for EVERYONE.
* She will stand up for our veterans and make sure they get the respect they deserve.
* MJ will fight for us, not special interest donors who only care about their dollars.

**We deserve a leader in Washington, and I KNOW that MJ will be that leader.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a6bd6764f894/day-of-action?e=140a9b81e7)

| |
---
| | Team Dani:

If you’re on our volunteer team, you get notes about phone banking and lit drops. Maybe you’ve participated in one of our incredible weekends of action.

Yesterday, we helped put together a big Day of Action in Ottawa, Illinois with the LaSalle County Democrats. I chatted with persuadable voters, we handed out signs, and we recruited new volunteers. It was a beautiful day at the park and a beautiful opportunity for people interested in democracy to show up in support of our pursuit of meaningful representation in this district.

**Our phone bankers are making 8,000 dials every week. That’s 8,000 opportunities to hear what is on the hearts and minds of our neighbors in IL-16. 8,000 potential Dani voters. **

[Let’s honor that 8,000 figure and raise $8,000 from this email alone. This is a big list — how many of you will pitch in $35?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=4e238812ae&e=140a9b81e7) Team Dani

PS - check out our Day of Action below! Interested in helping us call voters from home, wherever you are? [Sign up here today! ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a4000f64c5&e=140a9b81e7)

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da71/53d9897e/55b6df87/1c88e665/3759801762/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

Mark Warner continues to work hard to make life better for _every_ Virginian. Our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark is focused on in the Senate.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now:**
* Last night, Mark participated in his second debate against his GOP opponent at Norfolk State University. In this debate, Mark discussed how he will keep delivering on his promise to provide racial equity, coronavirus aid, and a stronger economy for all Virginians.
> -- The next debate will be in Richmond on October 13th.
* Mark released a new ad this week, **[highlighting the importance of broadband access.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da71/53d9897e/55b6df87/1c88e664/3759801762/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-campaign-releases-new-tv-ad-touting-rural-broadband-wins/")** Coronavirus did not create the digital divide in Virginia, but it highlighted how much more needs to be done to make sure everyone has access to affordable, accessible broadband. Mark has been working on this issue since his time as governor, when he oversaw the biggest investment of fiber optic cable to date at that time. In the Senate, he continues to advocate for investments in expanding broadband access across the Commonwealth and across the country.

* As the Trump administration and Republicans in Congress continue to attack the Affordable Care Act, **[Mark continues to work to ensure that Virginians with pre-existing conditions can keep their coverage.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da71/53d9897e/55b6df87/1c88e663/3759801762/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.winchesterstar.com/winchester_star/open-forum-if-you-care-about-health-care-vote-a-democratic-ticket/article_92db6f9d-8e62-541e-9cb0-7b9d5e0437c7.html")** No one should have to worry about their health insurance coverage -- especially in the middle of a global pandemic.

* **[Mark is calling on the Senate to wait until a new president is elected](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da71/53d9897e/55b6df87/1c88e662/3759801762/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://wina.com/news/064460-064460-warner-reacts-to-the-choice-of-amy-coney-barrett-for-a-vacant-seat-on-the-supreme-court/")** to confirm a new Supreme Court Justice to replace Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Voting is already underway in Virginia and in states across the country, and Mark believes the winner of the presidential election should decide who fills the vacancy.

* This weekend, Mark traveled to Gloucester and Norfolk for socially distanced meet and greet events with Gloucester and Mathews Democrats and Jody Wagner to discuss issues that matter the most to members of the community.

* Mark is pressing the U.S. Department of Justice to **[inspect two Virginia correctional facilities](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da71/53d9897e/55b6df87/1c88e661/3759801762/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.virginiamercury.com/2020/09/29/virginia-lawmakers-warn-of-deteriorating-conditions-in-two-federal-prisons-as-covid-19-spreads/")** due to unsafe conditions caused by the coronavirus pandemic, and will continue to track the health and safety of staff and incarcerated individuals.

* Voter registration ends in Virginia on October 13. Now is the time to check your registration at **[www.iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da71/53d9897e/55b6df87/1c88e660/3759801762/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/")** while there's still time. It takes less than five minutes and once you are registered, you can participate in early voting ahead of Election Day on November 3rd.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

Friend,

As the leader of the free world, President Trump had no choice. He didn’t want to stay in the White House and lock himself in, away from the American People.

Anyone who knows our President knows he couldn’t do that - it’s not who he is. This is the greatest and most powerful Country in the world and he couldn’t sit back while this was going on. He needed to go forward and lead our Nation and confront this unprecedented challenge head-on.

Even now, while he’s receiving medical care at Walter Reed, he’s making sure YOU are taken care of.

OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP

STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP >>

President Trump has been fighting to Keep America Safe for months. His top priority is developing and distributing a vaccine to our Nation’s most vulnerable, and then to all American Patriots so that life can get back to normal.

This is only possible if we re-elect President Trump for four more years, which is why we’re coming to you now. The Election is less than a month away and the President is counting on your support to WIN BIG.

He’s always had our back, and now it’s our turn to have his.

We are so close to breaking a daily fundraising record. If you can step up to support President Trump, you could put us over the top!

Peter, MSNBC reported that MJ can win in November... but that's not all!

They went on to say that, "John Cornyn has two big problems facing his re-election campaign -- one of which is MJ Hegar, the other is a poll showing **John Cornyn below 50 percent, which is always a dangerous indicator for incumbents."**

All the signs point to this race being one of the closest of 2020. Sen. Cornyn and his DC bosses are terrified that he'll lose and that Texas will flip for MJ. They've been pouring money into his campaign for months now, and **[we need your help to continue building the grassroots movement to defeat them!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd8/7f51f7bc/44879e0e/4efba270/3641831311/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201004.2nd__2237__&amount=10")**

We already have a massive grassroots army, but winning this race will truly take _all of us._

**Can we count on you to pitch in?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**I just wanted to reach out because today marks a huge milestone for our campaign — there are only 30 days left until Election Day 2020. **

The most important stretch of our campaign is hitting right now. Early in-person voting starts on Tuesday! And that means we are counting on Hoosiers to help push our campaign over the finish line.

Simply put, we’re relying on Hoosiers like you to help us keep building One Indiana for All for another four years.

Can we count on you to chip in $30.30 or any amount to help us finish strong? Donate below.

name: Lee Griffin For Congress
subject: Lee's Newsletter
body:
Hi everyone, What a rollercoaster this past week has been. It started off with the news of the president’s troubling tax returns, foll
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/06NJqYVl0/c?w=8OB3C0w_0SI_wODJALSNkgLOwsxG8cu8eqJJvGxJBOY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9zby8wNk5KcVlWbDAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Hi everyone, What a rollercoaster this past week has been. It started off with the news of the president's troubling tax returns, followed by a very contentious first presidential debate. Then just days later the president announced that he contracted COVID-19. This news is a sobering reminder that no one is immune to the virus, and we need to continue to take precautions to keep each other safe. That is what's so crucial about fighting this virus - the consequences that our actions have on others. We've since learned that other high ranking officials and advisors have been infected as well. I worry about the stage crew and event staff from the debate and the wait staff at the Rose Garden event who were also exposed and likely do not have the same coverage and access to healthcare as those who are in the news. Our thoughts and prayers go out to everyone affected and we wish them a speedy recovery. I was heartened by the Democratic response to hearing the president was in the hospital. Vice-President Biden, President Obama, Senators Harris and Sanders and so many more all sent out words of sympathy and well wishes to the president and first lady. This is what we do. We are compassionate and we care about everyone. It doesn't matter whether you're Republican, Democrat or Independent, we care about everyone's safety, health and wellbeing.
---
| | Last Sunday, I was in Clinton County meeting voters and distributing literature and swag with Joe Waltz and Margie Brown. We had a wonderful day together, and a mini class reunion for my mom and Clinton County Chair, Rose Reeder, both Lock Haven graduates.
---
|
---
| |
---
| Yesterday morning, I joined the Bradford County Democrats at their headquarters in Towanda. It was great to hear from and speak with voters about recent events and issues including a transition to clean energy and bridging the partisan divide in Washington.
---
| | Yesterday afternoon I spoke to the Susquehanna County Democrats at their fall rally in Blue Ridge Park about tackling climate change, expanding rural broadband access and making healthcare accessible and affordable. There was a big - socially distant - turnout and I loved standing on that stage looking out at so many activated citizens who are working to secure a better future for all of us.
---
|
---
| | Events like all these above fill me with energy and hope for the future. You make this campaign possible, and you are the reason we will get this country back on track. And I am so grateful to all of you for the amazing response to our fundraising efforts last week. Thank you to our volunteers, our county committees and everyone who has shared a post or placed one of our signs in their yard, like this one from Mary Hegarty and Buzz Meachum in Northumberland.
---
| |
---
| | I'm excited to share that Gulshan and I have finalized the dates for the Lee and G Road Trip, our in-person whirlwind tour of the district! We will be visiting all 15 counties in 8 days. We'll be kicking off the tour at the Lycoming County Democrats Fall Picnic in Williamsport, and closing with our Fall For Lee virtual fundraiser featuring some exciting special guests! Below is the schedule for the tour, and we'll share more details of the events on Facebook, Instagram and in next week's newsletter. I hope to see you soon! Day 1 - Saturday, October 10th
Lycoming County
Sullivan County
Day 2 - Sunday, October 11th
Wyoming County
Susquehanna County
Day 3 - Monday, October 12th
Bradford County
Tioga County
Day 4 - Tuesday, October 13th
Potter County
Clinton County
Day 5 - Wednesday, October 14th
Mifflin County
Centre County
Day 6 - Thursday, October 15th
Juniata County
Perry County
Day 7 - Friday, October 16th
Northumberland County
Union County
Day 8 - Saturday, October 17th
Snyder County
Virtual Fundraiser Friends, this is the final stretch. I know some of you are worried and exhausted, but I believe that we can do this. I believe that we are on the right side of history. And I believe that we will prevail come November. We have just one month left to do all that we can to make it so. The future is ours. Lee
---

clean_body: Hi everyone, What a rollercoaster this past week has been. It started off with the news of the president’s troubling tax returns, foll | | | | | | | | | | | Hi everyone, What a rollercoaster this past week has been. It started off with the news of the president's troubling tax returns, followed by a very contentious first presidential debate. Then just days later the president announced that he contracted COVID-19. This news is a sobering reminder that no one is immune to the virus, and we need to continue to take precautions to keep each other safe. That is what's so crucial about fighting this virus - the consequences that our actions have on others. We've since learned that other high ranking officials and advisors have been infected as well. I worry about the stage crew and event staff from the debate and the wait staff at the Rose Garden event who were also exposed and likely do not have the same coverage and access to healthcare as those who are in the news. Our thoughts and prayers go out to everyone affected and we wish them a speedy recovery. I was heartened by the Democratic response to hearing the president was in the hospital. Vice-President Biden, President Obama, Senators Harris and Sanders and so many more all sent out words of sympathy and well wishes to the president and first lady. This is what we do. We are compassionate and we care about everyone. It doesn't matter whether you're Republican, Democrat or Independent, we care about everyone's safety, health and wellbeing. | | Last Sunday, I was in Clinton County meeting voters and distributing literature and swag with Joe Waltz and Margie Brown. We had a wonderful day together, and a mini class reunion for my mom and Clinton County Chair, Rose Reeder, both Lock Haven graduates. | | | | Yesterday morning, I joined the Bradford County Democrats at their headquarters in Towanda. It was great to hear from and speak with voters about recent events and issues including a transition to clean energy and bridging the partisan divide in Washington. | | Yesterday afternoon I spoke to the Susquehanna County Democrats at their fall rally in Blue Ridge Park about tackling climate change, expanding rural broadband access and making healthcare accessible and affordable. There was a big - socially distant - turnout and I loved standing on that stage looking out at so many activated citizens who are working to secure a better future for all of us. | | | Events like all these above fill me with energy and hope for the future. You make this campaign possible, and you are the reason we will get this country back on track. And I am so grateful to all of you for the amazing response to our fundraising efforts last week. Thank you to our volunteers, our county committees and everyone who has shared a post or placed one of our signs in their yard, like this one from Mary Hegarty and Buzz Meachum in Northumberland. | | | | I'm excited to share that Gulshan and I have finalized the dates for the Lee and G Road Trip, our in-person whirlwind tour of the district! We will be visiting all 15 counties in 8 days. We'll be kicking off the tour at the Lycoming County Democrats Fall Picnic in Williamsport, and closing with our Fall For Lee virtual fundraiser featuring some exciting special guests! Below is the schedule for the tour, and we'll share more details of the events on Facebook, Instagram and in next week's newsletter. I hope to see you soon! Day 1 - Saturday, October 10th Lycoming County Sullivan County Day 2 - Sunday, October 11th Wyoming County Susquehanna County Day 3 - Monday, October 12th Bradford County Tioga County Day 4 - Tuesday, October 13th Potter County Clinton County Day 5 - Wednesday, October 14th Mifflin County Centre County Day 6 - Thursday, October 15th Juniata County Perry County Day 7 - Friday, October 16th Northumberland County Union County Day 8 - Saturday, October 17th Snyder County Virtual Fundraiser Friends, this is the final stretch. I know some of you are worried and exhausted, but I believe that we can do this. I believe that we are on the right side of history. And I believe that we will prevail come November. We have just one month left to do all that we can to make it so. The future is ours. Lee | | | | Share Via: | | | |

Team Siegel | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, click . | Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress Mike Siegel for Congress PO Box 2409 Austin, Texas 78701 United States mailto:siegel@siegelfortexas.org

name: Ethan
subject: We need volunteers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Peter, We are now less than a month until Election Day! That means we have to make sure we do all we can to get out the vote. Especially because so many are early voting, we need as many volunteers as possible _**right now**_! Check out the upcoming opportunities to help us out and I hope you'll join us! -Ethan
* * *
_We will be making calls with a brief training provided at the beginning. _ _Help us reach out to voters across Senate District 18!_ **Phone a Friend with WAKE** Monday October 5th from 6:00 to 8:00 pm [Sign up here](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXbiv1GoyVzLvgrZCuptYLQoa7UKXIk6eeE5rUUKJFE=/t7-q-Kw0P8d1sfVh93QIXJ_jyp3POZYeQnfWNtUGNI4=) **Phone a Friend with Like-Minded Geauga Friends** Wednesday October 7th from 7:00 to 9:00 pm [Sign up here](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXbiv1GoyVzLvgrZCuptYLQoa7UKXIk6eeE5rUUKJFE=/KswCKxnxTKteRWkv64XIozCCkfZXvfjodQMMmlIuYL4=) **Phone a Friend with Progress NEO** Wednesday October 14th from 6:30-8:30 pm [Sign up here](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXbiv1GoyVzLvgrZCuptYLQoa7UKXIk6eeE5rUUKJFE=/iBTa4c2A9d0ycBdtrmKsmQ4UxXRl0eUpkdtCnyqn7b4=) You can also use [this link at any time to sign up](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXbiv1GoyVzLvgrZCuptYLQoa7UKXIk6eeE5rUUKJFE=/O-5A2m6bnL3BFxp79dAy-oGEc9OFB9cAXl1PPZcOM24=) for open phone bank shifts! _Walk the neighborhoods and leave information about Betsy 's race for voters in the district! _ _It 's socially distant, fun, and a great way to support the campaign!_ No-Knock Canvass in Painesville (56 N State St) **Saturday, October 10th at 10 am** [Sign up here](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXbiv1GoyVzLvgrZCuptYLQoa7UKXIk6eeE5rUUKJFE=/uH621OB1eHUBh0RUlm-m6XPmugtzzgQczfwX9jUtM0g=) Interested in sharing an issue you care about while supporting Betsy? Our team would love to help you with resources for writing letters to the editor! Contact Ethan at ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com or 567-203-3847 if you are interested.
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXbiv1GoyVzLvgrZCuptYLQoa7UKXIk6eeE5rUUKJFE=/PUzgIPHLO1BI5jOSZBnzAiQ5iw-3JGW0e6kZ0ZoybhA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXbiv1GoyVzLvgrZCuptYLQoa7UKXIk6eeE5rUUKJFE=/7MME9Iq-y5W0fc3tobjw2588USn2N1jnhLR03iId3nc=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXbiv1GoyVzLvgrZCuptYLQoa7UKXIk6eeE5rUUKJFE=/zKmQXKU2ugDovVnLK-EFqzxjMlYgOpw_fTHP8RsyaDc=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXbiv1GoyVzLvgrZCuptYLQoa7UKXIk6eeE5rUUKJFE=/3_zGfTh31BtrztVTh1Km6XRspZb7mhYxrAKts4TfOAs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXbiv1GoyVzLvgrZCuptYLQoa7UKXIk6eeE5rUUKJFE=/enZKFOWIAXYKrDEqgcnnYI0omdndVnAVsGJbeBP1ThI=)

| Peter,
2020 is playing out to be one of the closest elections of our lifetime. It's going to take the Silent Majority uniting behind the President and his America First agenda to ensure a victory on November 3rd.
The Democrats are playing with some dangerous ideas. Defunding the police, opening borders, and full-blown socialism will take money out of your pockets and make our communities unsafe for our children and families. We have to stand up to their radical agenda by supporting strong, America-loving voices that will make sure our voices are heard in Washington. [Can I count on you to step up?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XYoRlbw3103qvTUSu60DVcdkT_BsIyeGm6XIhEPUHpQy_b08ktVy3zPPUC70AKZQSqyew7fZ8tyqTODRJn7TebrscLLZfZ9O8lpVhsIH4bqXTM53LF1bZ5A7UrBLGJWgNXUP83vqx_UQDHN8VWMJyRd1RD-BDOqIlfFNBdN_9lVt-nWtDYVjT5nx_0VvQ_lz&c=QlWvYyB4s8M2zBjROEVmjnxNWkevcZWpr7mwOiKaeRt7t1KEXwDY1Q==&ch=6Mc8w2ALmGLtNUe-NIvEfga-TlLzdc4a7l_kbSf0cjo7Z-g9xe1vGg==)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: Young Adult Task Force, Take It Outside, and Halloween
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
It's hard to believe, but this week marked seven months since Rhode Island's first case of COVID-19. My heart goes out to the families of the 1,118 Rhode Islanders we have lost to this virus. We are going to continue to combat the spread of COVID-19 at every turn to protect the health and safety of all Rhode Islanders.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MifvpbNIb6VHuq_p2djL7ZZAEntP2gffb9SGreuZeF_9CfIpyGt7dMtp-t7W05AiezqeLHx9UcrJWKdbST9ZKasGH0E6kf4jhGmKSaml-c7IycNN2DLqYdtL8H0g_d-t2uscmuOvhOK6imFmMIQeG-wPrYVGQ_wbxiaXFiZNtpmbOu3032PiAAMgHbxeFLaTXXWUve56-n1Mau3qwMUJ7vDGNVxzso___K0oBiWCNtNlkjIGuz8ZfUKaQjETVQAKfj7EUBTT8ns-rrzZW-iZc1kojzLIA4IPJlGfESxK-PRHNG7kJ_PKZgPgncaJ800rlPL3oYUR2x0=&c=o2mGRTwYYzSpSsfh2ArWIOy0YTwYNm-r9rw7gEF5bOEeKF9adIUBHw==&ch=DrGUnruGxTQ89_NTu0hxkKZXTteh1ywuNv-tip3KLRHZ3jGCwq8eTg==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
YOUNG ADULT TASK FORCE
Like many states across the country, we have seen a spike in the number of cases among 19-24-year-olds. We've worked closely with our college leaders to get this under control and have been successful in reducing cases, but this age group is still outpacing the others.

To combat that, we're convening a Young Adult Task Force led by students from across Rhode Island's colleges and universities, as well as local leaders and representatives of high-density communities. This group will help us develop a strategy to convey the risks and consequences of COVID-19 to young adults and incentivize following public health guidelines.
| | |
---|---
|
TAKE IT OUTSIDE

I'm excited to say that we received more than 80 proposals for Take It Outside funding. These innovative ideas deserve to be implemented, and so we've expanded the program. Instead of announcing $1 million in grants on Thursday like we had planned, we announced $3 million. You can see the list of recipients [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MifvpbNIb6VHuq_p2djL7ZZAEntP2gffb9SGreuZeF_9CfIpyGt7dMtp-t7W05AiqmviDA7g-IklML1M8rujHje-R8lUzeNAsFUhXeDST7ZPFq4s2I7sM62XVmmROi4o5LdXjzThotuiZesrKH01oAWODPi0V9qyFCF4N27xzT8=&c=o2mGRTwYYzSpSsfh2ArWIOy0YTwYNm-r9rw7gEF5bOEeKF9adIUBHw==&ch=DrGUnruGxTQ89_NTu0hxkKZXTteh1ywuNv-tip3KLRHZ3jGCwq8eTg==).

We want to continue the success of this program, so we've set aside an additional $2 million for a second round. If you haven't submitted a proposal and want to get involved, go to [TakeItOutsideRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MifvpbNIb6VHuq_p2djL7ZZAEntP2gffb9SGreuZeF_9CfIpyGt7dLA7B0FSWLxbDoSSpyHFlh0f3Pt2mdmUafXLDY8XF7Iu0SS89rtRp0Z-nZ1U77jL9NMGqEW8wFOws8bhF1U32jzq28kfkcMCDA==&c=o2mGRTwYYzSpSsfh2ArWIOy0YTwYNm-r9rw7gEF5bOEeKF9adIUBHw==&ch=DrGUnruGxTQ89_NTu0hxkKZXTteh1ywuNv-tip3KLRHZ3jGCwq8eTg==). I can't wait what creative ways people come up with to stay safe.
| | |
---|---
|
HALLOWEEN

In times like this, we need fun, levity, and a sense of community more than ever. In that spirit, there will be Halloween this year! Like everything else, it will look different, and we'll all need to make some changes and take extra precautions, but we can still make this a fun, safe evening for our kids.

We've posted guidance online about Halloween and about fall activities more generally, such as apple picking, farmer's markets, and hayrides. You can find all of this guidance on [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MifvpbNIb6VHuq_p2djL7ZZAEntP2gffb9SGreuZeF_9CfIpyGt7dKRKWLdO7r1RlsPOqktX0ax_Wx7OY7pR3Uz1b_DH12HSOqTATI-_bDbEaAwenWxrIXi0Inb4PFWxjPgdqQoBhfQqPV0WrYLBPg==&c=o2mGRTwYYzSpSsfh2ArWIOy0YTwYNm-r9rw7gEF5bOEeKF9adIUBHw==&ch=DrGUnruGxTQ89_NTu0hxkKZXTteh1ywuNv-tip3KLRHZ3jGCwq8eTg==) under Parks and Recreation.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MifvpbNIb6VHuq_p2djL7ZZAEntP2gffb9SGreuZeF_9CfIpyGt7dMtp-t7W05AiwaGwKJYybil1A9NAdFlOV1VptZTeilp6Oxktrv_nD0o8GWiDeZXsDGXm91YDa5Swy7BT0mWq186VkF9FHTwW0J8ezCw67Z5Fi7p448vgbMqgJ25X5kClJS0Sfb3XkwN4k4z01O-CqsicsWdaevRDq_l72nocSuhcFN-3UhH9XkiJ9oT3qgutiZNGCv4XQ8xvapl-sKoIb27GdZAZCFd0SnTDEJxSK0fSqLmlbS0ZMAFSItfWzk1u1ljPbLixsHbDerN0mLYK3yg=&c=o2mGRTwYYzSpSsfh2ArWIOy0YTwYNm-r9rw7gEF5bOEeKF9adIUBHw==&ch=DrGUnruGxTQ89_NTu0hxkKZXTteh1ywuNv-tip3KLRHZ3jGCwq8eTg==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903

---

It’s the finest medical center in the world - and they’ve been doing an incredible job. The President is feeling great and is ready to get back with the American People soon so he can Make America Great Again. He has made it clear that we need to finish our movement the exact same way we started - fighting for the People, not just in the United States, but all around the world. The President is going to beat the coronavirus, and he’s going to beat it soundly. The last four years, President Trump has been fighting for us every single day. He has never stopped working for the American People. In fact, he has a message for YOU to provide you with an update on how he’s doing and his plan moving forward: OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP AT WALTER REED STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP NOW President Trump is a fighter and he will come out of this stronger than before and even more fired up to win. name: MJ Hegar
subject: John Cornyn doesn't give a damn about your health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn doesn't take health care seriously -- except to gut it.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba61e/1787370037/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Did you see what Sen. Cornyn said about the Affordable Care Act and protecting people with pre-existing conditions, Peter? | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba61d/1787370037/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201004.3nd__2254__&amount=10")
---
He thinks that gutting the Affordable Care Act is fine, even though _millions_ of people with pre-existing conditions receive coverage through it.

**And just hours after this tweet, he voted in favor of overturning the ACA _again_.**
[DONATE TO PROTECT THE ACA](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba61d/1787370037/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201004.3nd__2254__&amount=10")
---
Health care is deadly serious for millions of Texans, but Sen. Cornyn has voted REPEATEDLY to rip it away. He voted not to stop a lawsuit that seeks to overturn the Affordable Care Act -- in the midst of the deadliest pandemic in generations.

Here's the deal, Peter, there are at least **4.8 million people with pre-existing conditions in Texas** , and now, anyone who's had COVID-19 will have a pre-existing condition as well. The Affordable Care Act protects **ALL** of us by ensuring that insurance companies can't charge us more for having a pre-existing condition.

**Sen. Cornyn has been on the government payroll for nearly forty years. Between his benefits and three taxpayer-funded pensions, he just doesn 't understand just how vital the ACA is for millions of us.**

**[Help me defeat Sen. Cornyn, because I will always defend our health care>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba61d/1787370037/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201004.3nd__2254__&amount=10")

Will you pitch in again to protect people with pre-existing conditions?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba61c/1787370037/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201004.3nd__2254__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba613/1787370037/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201004.3nd__2254__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba612/1787370037/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201004.3nd__2254__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba611/1787370037/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201004.3nd__2254__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba610/1787370037/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201004.3nd__2254__")**
This is on all of us,

MJ Hegar
[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba61d/1787370037/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201004.3nd__2254__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba617/1787370037/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2254&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cda/7f51f7bc/449ddaac/4efba616/1787370037/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: 1 Month – I need you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, It's been a long campaign - but we are now only one month away from the critical election on November 3rd, and we have to keep fighting every day. My opponent is well-funded by liberal donors who want to help him implement Joe Biden and Bernie Sanders' high-tax, unconstitutional, and job-killing policies - and we cannot let them win. I know what we need in the office and what type of leader Americans need moving forward - a JOB CREATOR. [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/RPpy5rgqnlTAkSbulCHAgA/Jr2AqEZ8ElFhsEKQm9zQtw) I've been a small businessman for over 20 years - I don't talk about creating jobs, I've done it before, and I know how to do it moving forward. That's why I have been working hard as your Congressman to advance policies, cosponsor bills, and introduce legislation that will unleash the American and Western New York economy - and with your help, I am going to keep doing it in my upcoming term. Can I put you on my team of dedicated patriots who want to rebuild our historic American economy? [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/RPpy5rgqnlTAkSbulCHAgA/Jr2AqEZ8ElFhsEKQm9zQtw) Together, we will build our region, unleash our private sector, and set new economic records for our Nation. Let's win this! Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/SHig3In6YzvimTvoB7X0IA/Jr2AqEZ8ElFhsEKQm9zQtw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/AEgjerdKt4lCGTub4ZsVmg/Jr2AqEZ8ElFhsEKQm9zQtw)
* * *
5501 Camp Road

subject: Our strongest quarter to date
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Thanks to your investment, we are able to focus these final weeks on reaching more voters with our message of Dignity and Justice for All. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9dc3e87e57&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Thank you so much! I am grateful to share with you that these past few months have been our strongest fundraising to date.

This campaign had its strongest quarter because you answered the call. I do not accept corporate PAC money, but rely on the people of this district who understand what’s at stake in this election to help raise the funds needed to reach voters through multiple media outlets, including TV.

---
|
---
|
Jackie **relies** on money from corporate special interests, which is why she answers to them and not to you. She doesn’t have to.

[We still have a big job ahead of us and need your help to keep the momentum going.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=6aebef1258&e=5886ca081d)

Thanks to your investment, we are able to focus these final weeks on reaching more voters with our message of Dignity and Justice for All.

**[Tomorrow is the final day to register to vote with early voting starting Tuesday.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=e3d8de2bb9&e=5886ca081d) **If we all ask one or two family members to check their registration and to vote, we can continue the momentum of a blue wave in four weeks. I ask you for your vote, and I am grateful for your on-going support.

Pat
---
|
